blended.narrative: Cranmore Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing drizzle, highs of 45°F.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
